title: What comes after transformers? -- A selective survey connecting ideas in deep learning
preview:
What comes after transformers? – A selective survey
connecting ideas in deep learning⋆
Johannes Schneider1
University of Liechtenstein, Vaduz, Liechtenstein
johannes.schneider@uni.li
Abstract. Transformers have become the de-facto standard model in artificial
intelligence since 2017 despite numerous shortcomings ranging from energy in-
efficiency to hallucinations. Research has made a lot of progress in improving
elements of transformers, and, more generally, deep learning manifesting in many
proposals for architectures, layers, optimization objectives, and optimization tech-
niques. For researchers it is difficult to keep track of such developments on a
broader level. We provide a comprehensive overview of the many important, re-
cent works in these areas to those who already have a basic understanding of deep
learning. Our focus differs from other works, as we target specifically novel, al-
ternative potentially disruptive approaches to transformers as well as successful
ideas of rec
